name: Phrase Feigenbaum Shrink Demo

phrases.comment: First phrase: 4 notes at 1 second each = 4 seconds total.
Second phrase: shrunk to 4/4.669 = ~0.86 seconds total.
Third phrase: shrunk again to ~0.18 seconds total. Rapid burst.

description: Demonstrates phrase_feigenbaum_shrink which scales each phrase to be 1/4.669 the duration of the previous phrase, creating accelerating repetitions.
